title: Namakkal poultry industry seeks feed-cost relief from incoming government
summary: Namakkal's poultry federation has formally written to all parties asking that the new state government immediately announce a feed-cost relief package to stabilise egg prices.

title: Namakkal TVK MLAs join Chennai camp ahead of Governor's call
summary: All four newly elected TVK MLAs from Namakkal have moved to the party's Chennai camp on May 8 as the wait for the Governor's invitation continues.

title: Namakkal lorry owners flag confusion over new FASTag matching rule
summary: The Namakkal Lorry Owners' Association has urged NHAI to delay enforcement of the FASTag-number plate matching rule by a fortnight, citing widespread confusion at toll plazas.

title: Rural Namakkal women back continuation of ₹1,000 scheme
summary: A field survey across rural Namakkal panchayats showed strong support for continuing the women's ₹1,000 monthly scheme, regardless of which alliance forms the government.

title: Namakkal egg prices steady as exports to Gulf pick up
summary: Namakkal egg prices held steady through the first week of May, supported by improved Gulf export demand and stable feed inventories at major farms.
